data.name: 遊魂 -Kiss on my Deity-
data.detailed_description:
■遊戲介紹

『獸耳×和風幻想』

戀愛少女的神通力冒險

《遊魂 -Kiss on my Deity-》以HD畫質，並重新調整為全年齡向版本全新登場！

這部於2008年推出、並曾改編為動畫的作品，

在 Lump of Sugar 的監修下，對部分表現進行了重新調整，

讓更廣泛年齡層玩家都能遊玩。

請盡情體驗這部以高畫質重現的經典之作吧！

●故事

主角泉戶裕理是八衢神社的獨子。

某天，他與神社土地的守護者相遇，守護者將少女「真白」託付給了他。然而，原本作為危險存在而被封印的「太轉依」卻也因意外被釋放。

擁有除魔靈能的裕理，將與包括青梅竹馬在內的4位美少女一同成長，探索如何與非人類的未知生物和平共處。

▶角色

・泉戶真白　CV：松田理沙

一位稱呼主人公為丈夫，並在開學第一天就闖進他的生活的女孩。

她在見到主人公後，迅速展開了積極的攻勢，最後甚至還直接住進了泉戶家。

她的個性開朗又包容，不過生起氣來卻十分恐怖……

「無論何時，我都會站在你這邊的。」

・河合亞芽里　CV：花野香

主人公的青梅竹馬兼同學。

雖然她的個性衝動魯莽，又經常把身邊的人耍得團團轉，但在戀愛方面卻十分膽小謹慎……？

「啊哈哈哈哈！你們兩個有我在真是太幸運了！可得好好好好感謝我唷！」

・如月美冬　CV：三咲里奈

在故事開頭的某個事件中，因為懷疑主人公心懷不軌而主動接近他。

她身為名門世家的繼承人，從小受到良好的教育，品格高尚優秀，能時常保持冷靜、深思熟慮。

她愛好閱讀，特別是以「自由戀愛」為題材的作品。

除此之外她也精通武藝，尤其以劍術最為拿手。

「住你家附近的學生，總說能聽到機車的聲音……」

・小鳥遊由美奈　CV：青戸由羽

將主人公視為哥哥並仰慕著的少女。因為父母的事業失敗，而被泉戶家收養。

她會因他人的目光變得異常緊張，失敗連連。

「嗚哇啊啊啊！全部都是由美奈不好！」

data.short_description: 《遊魂 -Kiss on my Deity-》以HD畫質，並重新調整為全年齡向版本全新登場！ 這部於2008年推出、並曾改編為動畫的作品， 在 Lump of Sugar 的監修下，對部分表現進行了重新調整， 讓更廣泛年齡層玩家都能遊玩。 請盡情體驗這部以高畫質重現的經典之作吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64位元（不支援32位元）
  • 處理器: Intel Core i系列或更新版本
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

data.name: Tayutama: Kiss on my Deity
data.detailed_description:
■Game Introduction

Kenomimi x Japanese fantasy

A supernatural romance adventure game

Tayutama: Kiss on my Deity returns, now remastered in Full HD and updated for all ages!

Originally released in 2008 and later adapted into an anime, this beloved title has been carefully refined under the supervision of Lump of Sugar, crafting an improved version that every generation of gamers will love.

Enjoy this classic reborn in high definition, now with a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay experience!

●Story

The story follows protagonist Yuri Mito, the only son of the local priest at Yachimata Shrine.

After a series of events during spring break, Yuri meets Kikuramikami no Hime, the guardian of a mystical relic in the woods near his school. She explains the strained history between humans and the Tayutai, a mythical race sealed within the relic due to their potential threat to humanity. To bridge the gap between their worlds, the goddess reincarnates as a young girl named Mashiro and entrusts herself to Yuri. However, the relic is accidentally destroyed, releasing the Tayutai. Particularly dangerous are the "Three Mightiest," powerful entities hostile toward humans.

Armed with spirit powers unique to his lineage, Yuri teams up with Mashiro and three other heroines to explore whether humans and Tayutai can coexist peacefully. This romantic fantasy adventure tells a heartfelt tale of growth, connection, and the mysteries of love.

▶Character

・Mashiro Mito　VA: Risa Matsuda

Upon meeting, she immediately declares the protagonist her husband and even shows up on the first day back to school.

Her pursuit of the protagonist is what many would call "intense", and she ends up living in the Mito household.

Mashiro is tolerant and level-headed, but that just makes rousing her anger all the more terrifying.

"I'm always on your side, no matter what."

・Ameri Kawai　VA: Kaori Hanano

The childhood friend and classmate of the protagonist, the protagonist.

She can be persistent and persuasive in drawing others into her way of handling things, but when it comes to love, she's a bit on the timid side...

"You guys are so lucky to have me around! Seriously, you should be showering me with thanks!"

・Mifuyu Kisaragi　VA: Rina Misaki

As the heir to the aristocratic Kisaragi Conglomerate, Mifuyu has been raised to be both strong of character and someone others will naturally rally behind.

She's rather fond of romance novels, the kind where things are depicted a little too pure for reality.

She's well trained in many things, including swordsmanship and martial arts.

"...You really do love bikes, don't you?"

・Yumina Takanashi　VA: Yu Aoto

Yumina looks up to the protagonist as an older brother. When her birth parents went bankrupt, they gave her to the Mito family to raise.

She's one of those people who immediately fails at a task whenever someone is watching out of nervousness.

"Waaaaaaah! If it just wasn't for me..."

data.short_description: Now remastered in Full HD and updated for all ages! Originally released in 2008 and later adapted into an anime, this beloved title has been carefully refined under the supervision of Lump of Sugar, crafting an improved version that every generation of gamers will love.
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10/11 64-bit required *32-bit not supported
  • Processor: Intel Core i series processor or later
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
